docket_entries.description: NIGHTINGALE, REBECCA CASE COMES ON FOR HEARING; DANI SCHINZING APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF; BENJAMINE RICHARDSON APPEARS AS DEFENDANT; JAMARIO DAMONT RICHARDSON FAILS TO APPEAR; CONTEMPT PAPERWORK TO BE SUBMITTED; ORDER FOR DELIVERY ENTERED; COURT FINDS THAT THE DEFENDANTS, ACTING SEPERATELY OR IN COURT WITH OTHERS, HAVE WRONGFULLY RETAINED A 2017 NISSAN ROGUE SPORT AND HAS CONCEALED THE SAME AWAY FROM PLAINTIFF; YOU ARE THEREFORE COMMANDED TO REPLEVY THE VEHICLE IN POSSESSION OF THE DEFENDANTS, AND/OR ANY THIRD PERSONS, AND DELIVER OR RELINQUISH POSSESSION OF THE SAME TO THE PLAINTIFF. ((CLERK RETURNED ORDER TO COUNSEL FOR FILING.))
